daddys-popcorn.name: Daddy's Popcorn
instructions: Cut a paper grocery bag in half crosswise. (To use as a serving bowl and to absorb excess oil.)

Combine popcorn, oil, and margarine in a 2-quart pot; heat on high heat, and constantly shake the pot back and forth, until first corn kernel pops, then cover the pot, and continue shaking. When the lid lifts off the pot, remove the pot from heat; hold it over the prepared bag until popping stops.
Pour popcorn into the bag. Season with ¼ teaspoon seasoned salt; shake bag to distribute. Taste before seasoning with more salt.

dairy-free-corn-chowder-with-clams-and-c.name: Dairy-free Corn Chowder With Clams And Chorizo

ingredients.item: . hot smoked spanish paprika or smoked paprika

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large pot over medium-high. Add chorizo and cook, breaking up into smaller pieces with a wooden spoon and stirring every minute or so, until browned and crisp, about 5 minutes. Sprinkle in paprika and stir to combine, then scrape chorizo and oil into a small bowl. Wipe out pot.

Pour remaining 2 Tbsp. oil into same pot and set over medium heat. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often and adding a splash of water if starting to brown, until softened but not browned, 10–12 minutes. Add clams and toss to combine. Cover pot and cook until clams open, 5–7 minutes. Uncover and transfer opened clams to a medium bowl, leaving liquid behind. If any clams are still closed, cover pot again and cook remaining clams until opened, about 4 minutes more. Transfer open clams to bowl; discard any that have not opened at this point. Tent bowl with foil.

Pour 3 cups water into pot and bring to a simmer. Add corn kernels and cook until tender, about 3 minutes. Remove pot from heat and purée one third of chowder in a blender until very smooth. Return purée to pot and mix well. (Or use an immersion blender if you have one and blend directly in the pot until you’ve blended about one third and chowder is partly thickened.) Stir in lime juice; taste and season with salt if needed.
Divide chowder among shallow bowls and add clams. Spoon chorizo and oil over and scatter some cilantro on top.

dark-chocolate-marbled-banana-bread-with.name: Dark Chocolate Marbled Banana Bread With Greek Yogurt
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a loaf pan.
Whisk flour, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl.
Whisk hot water and cocoa powder in a large bowl until smooth.
Combine mashed bananas, Greek yogurt, butter, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract in another large bowl; mix well. Fold in flour mixture until thoroughly combined.
Mix half of the banana mixture into the cocoa mixture until well combined.
Spoon banana mixture and cocoa mixture into the prepared pan, alternating between the two.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 55 minutes.

3. Peel the onion and reinde.

6. Add butter, salça, thyme, salt and broth and cook for 10 minutes.
7. Mix them in a bowl.
8. Reindeed onion, chopped parsley, thyme, eggs, antepfan, salt and pepper.
9. Round the turf in the form of kneader roll.
10. Place the oiled oven tray.
11. 11. Cook for 15 minutes in the oven of 170 degrees.
12. Mix 1 egg yolk and olive oil.
12. August Remove from this mixture and place it in a row.
14 July Add meatballs and wrap them as packs.
15. Cut down the yellowing strains from the edges.
16. Place the doughy meatballs into the oven tray.
17. September Remove the egg yolk left on the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
18. Stove on it.
19. September Cook for 20 minutes in the oven of 170 degrees.
20. Serve with slices and tomato sauce.
21.  Afiyet olsun.

date-night-pork-chop.name: Date Night Pork Chop
instructions:
You want to season your 1 lb. pork loin chop (1–1½" thick) in advance and let it sit out at room temperature (it cooks much more evenly that way). Pat chop dry with paper towels and place on a plate. Season generously on both sides with salt and pepper, turning with tongs; set aside while you do your prep (it can sit at room temperature up to 1 hour, but prep won’t take you that long).
→  Leaving meat on the counter freak you out? Read this.
Shave 1 oz. Parmesan cheese with a vegetable peeler, then use your fingers to break into small shards. Cover with a damp paper towel (to prevent it from drying out).
Using the bottom of a medium skillet, preferably cast iron, smash 3 Tbsp. hazelnuts, a few at a time, on a cutting board, breaking into bits.
Peel 1 shallot, then finely chop.
Separate leaves from 1 large or 2 small endive, trimming from the bottom as you work your way to the core. Place in a medium bowl, cover with damp paper towel, and chill until ready to use.

Preheat skillet you used to smash hazelnuts over medium heat. Drizzle ½ tsp. honey over one side of pork chop, then drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil. Rub with clean hands all over surface of chop, then turn and rub second side with same honey-oil mixture to evenly coat (this will help the pork caramelize as you cook it).

Lay pork in skillet and cook, leaving it be, until first side is dark brown and caramelized all over, about 3 minutes. Turn and cook second side until browned, about 3 minutes longer. Turn pork chop upright and hold on its side with tongs to sear fat cap; cook about 2 minutes.

Turn heat to low and cook chop another minute on both sides. Transfer to cutting board and insert an instant-read thermometer into middle of chop, about ½" from bone. It should register about 130°. If it’s under, cook another minute or two, then let rest on cutting board 5–10 minutes. Remove skillet from heat.
Add hazelnuts and 2 Tbsp. oil to skillet. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring with tongs, until hazelnuts turn golden, about 3 minutes.
Add shallots; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until shallots are softened and browned and hazelnuts smell toasty, about 2 minutes.
Stir in remaining 2 tsp. honey. Cut 1 lemon in half and squeeze juice from one half into skillet. Stir to combine, then remove from heat.
Cut around core of 1 apple, removing flesh in 3 lobes. Thinly slice 2 of the 3 pieces, then snack on the remaining piece if you like.
Remove bowl of endive from refrigerator and add apple and cheese; season with salt and pepper. Drizzle with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil, squeeze second lemon half over, and toss to coat.
Cut bone away from chop and cut meat into ½"-thick slices. Place pork and bone on one side of a large plate and pour juices over; season with salt.
Gently arrange salad next to chop. Spoon shallot-hazelnut mixture over salad and pork and serve.

decadent-ozark-peach-turnovers.name: Decadent Ozark Peach Turnovers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Cut peaches into a total of 16 crescent-shaped slices; set aside. Unroll crescent roll dough on a flat work surface; separate into 16 triangles. Place 1 peach slice at base of 1 dough triangle; roll up to enclose peach in dough. Repeat with remaining peach slices and dough triangles. Arrange turnovers in a baking pan.
Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat; whisk in sugar, vanilla, and salt. Pour mixture evenly over turnovers, followed by soda, then sprinkle with cinnamon.
Bake in the preheated oven until turnovers are golden brown and liquid is bubbling, 30 to 40 minutes.

delicious-chilean-italian-churrasco-sand.name: Delicious Chilean Italian Churrasco Sandwich
delicious-chilean-italian-churrasco-sand.original_name: Delicioso sándwich de churrasco italiano chileno

ingredients.item: 250 g of beef and veal in fine sheets (back, posta or seat)
2  panes frica o similares (de miga blanda)

instructions: Wash the tomato and cut them into slices about half an inch. Reserve.
Peel the paddle, remove the bone and smash the pulp with a fork and get a rustic paste. Add salt to suit and mix.
Warm a large frying pan or medium-high plate. Unite with the oil and place the meat sheets. Cooking 2-3 minutes per side, or until they have golden edges and still juicy centre. Dig during cooking.
Open the loaves and, if you prefer, slightly twist the inner part onto the frying pan to better absorb the juices.
Rig up the sandwich by placing freshly made meat onto the bread base.
Encima de la carne, distribuye las rodajas de tomate y, sobre ellas, la palta triturada.
Finaliza con una capa generosa de mayonesa, deja caer ligeramente por los lados para lograr el aspecto tradicional.
Cierra con la tapa del pan y sirve de inmediato para que la carne conserve su jugosidad.

delicious-fish-stew-comedera.name: Delicious Fish Stew

ingredients.item: 500 g pounding or pounding (cut into pieces)
300 gr de auyama o calabaza amarilla

instructions: Pela la yuca, lava y corta en cubos medianos.
Limpia muy bien las mazorcas y corta en trozos.
Add 6 cups of water to a deep pot and heat up with high heat. When tibia, incorporates the yucca and cut pits. Cover and let cook for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, she pits the banana and cuts into pieces. Do the same with the auyama.
Peel his teeth with garlic and steak. Clean the chiles and cut into pieces by the long onion.
Warm a frying pan with oil and scattering garlic teeth with interns and onion long for 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Also incorporates dusted garlic, mix and paddle for another minute. Turn it off.
After 15 minutes of cooking of vegetables, add the auyama and banana.
Add vegetable frying with spices and mix. Cooking for another 5 minutes.
Incorpora el pescado cortado en trozos, mezcla y rectifica de sal y pimienta.
It ends cooking from 10 to 15 minutes or as soon as the vegetables and fish are soft.
Turn off and add the lemon juice and the chopped cilantro.
Sirve calienta y disfruta.

delicious-hazelnut-nougat-comedera.name: Delicious Hazelnut Nougat

ingredients.item: 120 gr de avellanas crudas sin piel
40 gr de miel de flores o miel de azahar
30 g chewed or fine brown sugar
20 gr de chocolate blanco de buena calidad
Ralladura muy fina de naranja (opcional, pero recomendada)
1 cdita de extracto natural de vainilla

instructions: It purifies the oven to 170 been 3 been. Place the hazelnuts onto a plate and have them for 12 to 15 minutes, stirring midtime, till they are golden and very aromatic. Let's get cold.
Reserva unas 30 g de avellanas y pica el resto de forma irregular para aportar textura.
In a hot-proof bowl, mix honey, sugar and butter. Take to the bathroom and remove and get a homogenous syrup.
Agrega el chocolate blanco troceado y mezcla hasta que se funda por completo. Retira del calor.
Incorpora la vainilla, la ralladura de naranja, la canela y la sal. Mezcla bien.
Bat slightly the egg clear till it's sparkling, without reaching snow.
Add clear to tibia syrup as a thread, constantly mixing to avoid cooking.
Incorpora las avellanas picadas y mezcla hasta obtener una masa espesa y brillante.
Fold the production into a small rectangular mold with vegetable paper and press with a spatula.
Coloca las avellanas enteras reservadas por encima, presionando ligeramente.
Let them rest at room temperature until they have been completely solidified. Then refrigerates at least 2 hours before breaking and cutting.

delicious-loroco-pupusas-comedera.name: Delicious Loroco Pupusas
instructions: Start the recipe with the dough. Mix salt with corn flour into a bowl.

Then you're gonna get warm water. Mix with your hands and amasa very well till you get a very smooth and homogenous mass. If you notice that she lacks water or flour, you can add a little more but it should be rather compact.
Una vez tengas tu masa, divide en bolitas iguales. Humedece tus manos y ve formando las tortillas, aplastandolas poco a poco.
When you have your omelette, add some parlotoco and frosted fresh cheese at the centre.
Tapa con otra tortilla encima y presiona los bordes para que se unan.
Warm an iron or frying pan, grease and cook apes for 6 minutes from each side or till they are well golden.
. Once ready, enjoy!

delicious-roasted-chicken-comedera.name: Delicious Roasted Chicken
instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, condimentando el pollo con sal y pimienta, que quede bien sazonado.
Posteriormente, vas a calentar una cazuela con aceite.
When it's hot, you're gonna seal the chicken up and about till they create a cracking cape but get juicy inside. We'll get the chicken back and we'll get them.
Now, carry out to peel and cut them into julian. In the same frying pan where the chicken was sealed, you will add some more oil and scattering the onion till they are well whitened.
When the onion's at this point, you'll pour the cognac and mix. Let's cook for a few minutes till the alcohol evapors.
Once you have reduced some, you will add the steamed garlic teeth, the laurel leaf, cinnamon and tomato cut into notebooks. Mix and cook for 2 minutes.
Procede a incorporar el pollo, mezcla con el resto de los ingredientes y deja cocinar a fuego medio por 20 minutos hasta que todo se integre y el pollo quede bien impregnado de la salsa.
Turn off, serve and come with rice or mashed potatoes.
Enjoy!

deluxe-lemon-poppy-seed-rolls-with-raspb.name: Deluxe Lemon Poppy Seed Rolls With Raspberry Filling
instructions: Combine milk, egg, egg yolk, lemon juice, sugar, poppy seeds, lemon zest, and yeast in a large bowl. Stir in 2 cups flour, butter, and salt, working in more flour as needed to pull dough away from the sides of the bowl.
Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until dough is smooth and elastic, adding more flour as necessary. Place in a lightly greased bowl; cover, and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Gently deflate dough and roll into a 12x10-inch rectangle. Spread with raspberry jam, leaving a 1/2-inch border. Roll up from the long side, like a jelly roll, and seal. Carefully slice log into 12 pieces and place cut-side down into a greased 8x8-inch square pan. Cover and let rise until puffy, 40 to 45 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until lightly browned on top, about 30 minutes.
Make glaze by stirring together confectioners' sugar, milk, lemon juice, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Drizzle over warm rolls.

derby-pie.name: Derby Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Press pie crust into a 9-inch pie plate; prick bottom with a fork.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust looks dry, 4 to 5 minutes. Cool. Reduce the oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Heat whiskey in a small saucepan over very low heat; stir in instant coffee until dissolved. Stir in pecans.
Beat sugar and eggs together in a large bowl until well blended; beat in corn syrup, butter, and vanilla extract. Fold in bourbon-pecan mixture and chocolate chips; pour filling into pie crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is firm and golden, and crust is light brown, 40 to 45 minutes. Cool completely before slicing, at least 30 minutes.

detroit-style-pepperoni-pizza.name: Detroit-style Pepperoni Pizza
instructions: To make this recipe, start by preparing a half-batch of the Master Bread Dough.

Lightly brush Detroit-style pizza pan, 13x9" baking pan, or two 8x8" pans with extra-virgin olive oil. Lightly flour work surface with bread flour and turn ½ batch (360 g) Master Bread Dough out onto surface. If using a Detroit-style pizza pan or a 13x9" pan, pull edges of dough into the center, then turn over and hold opposite sides of the dough with your hands so the sides of your pinkies are touching the surface and rotate dough, gently working it into a round as you go. If using two 8x8" pans, divide dough in half and form using the same method as above. Gently transfer dough to prepared pan. Rub dough with oil and cover with a kitchen towel. Let rise in a warm, draft-free spot until dough expands a bit and is smooth and more pliable, about 1 hour.
Meanwhile, cut 8 oz. low-moisture mozzarella or brick cheese into small cubes. You should have 2 heaping cups.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 450°. Dimple dough with your fingers, gently pushing out to edges of pan. Scatter cheese evenly over dough all the way to the edges. Spoon ¾ cup store-bought marinara sauce over pizza in three even rows. Next, distribute 4 oz. pepperoni, sliced, evenly over sauce. Sprinkle with ½ tsp. dried oregano.

Bake pizza until crust is deep golden brown, 35–40 minutes. (You can also check doneness with an instant-read thermometer. It should register 190° when inserted into a thick part of the crust.) Remove from oven and top with ½ cup (lightly packed) basil leaves. Let cool in pan 5 minutes before slicing.

double-lemon-thumbprint-scones.name: Double-lemon Thumbprint Scones

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tablespoons chilled heavy whipping cream

instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 218°C. Line large heavy-duty rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper. Finely grate enough peel from lemons to measure 6 teaspoons; set grated peel aside. Squeeze enough juice from 1 lemon to measure 1 tablespoon (seal remaining lemons in plastic wrap and reserve for another use). Whisk flour and 1/2 cup sugar in medium bowl to blend. Add 1 1/4 cups chilled whipping cream, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, and 4 teaspoons finely grated lemon peel; stir gently to combine.

Gather dough together and turn out onto lightly floured work surface; knead briefly, 4 to 5 turns. Pat or roll out dough to 1-inch-thick round. Using 2 1/2- to 23/4-inch-diameter cookie cutter or biscuit cutter dipped in flour, cut out rounds. Reroll dough scraps and flatten to 1-inch thickness; cut out additional rounds. Transfer scones to prepared rimmed baking sheet, spacing scones about 1 inch apart. Using thumb, push down center of each scone to make deep indentation. Spoon about 1/2 teaspoon preserves into indentation of each scone.

Whisk remaining 2 tablespoons sugar, 2 tablespoons heavy whipping cream, and 2 teaspoons finely grated lemon peel in small bowl to blend. Brush top of scones generously with lemon glaze. Bake scones until golden and cake tester inserted horizontally into center of scone comes out clean, 18 to 20 minutes. Transfer thumbprint scones to rack and cool slightly. Serve scones warm or at room temperature.

drunk-german.name: Drunk German
instructions: Pour Jagermeister into tall glass.
Add root beer and stir.
